text.message: I can’t give you 2 for one wood red
its the least you can do
yeah but im literally in dead last
so i have a simple policy, ima solo block whoever blocks me
unless you pay what you owe
He stole from you back to back and is trying to steal your settle
Do I owe black 3 ore as well then?
Blue owes me and black wheat now
one wheat, but he aint in a position to pay up, cant get blood from a stone
no you are winning, so doesnt apply
you and blue are 1v1 rn, id pay your debts if i were you
I’m sorry but I disagree with the premise entirely
That was one of the ore. 2 more
thats fine, disagree with the guy best positioned to solo block you the entire game with knights and let blue win
Great red we are square now
But I have to build to tem
he says as he buys dev lol
ill block blue, orange, as soon as you stop pressuring army
As long as you knight off me
I’ll stop army now so you can flip the 3rd first red
i dont have knight atm, honestly i might need help with that
I’ll help you but you have to see I’ve paid the debt and am build to ten by doing this agreed
yeah im willing to work together, i did manage to retrieve my 3 ore, so i see that debt as settled
this gets me closer to a settle if you interest
We are best friends I hope
I do ned you to get army before blue gets both
i have a settle in hand
but need more cards for a dev
I’ll still hold off on army red
I’m good for my word but I really need you to get it before blue
i mean it wouldve helped if you traded me the dev instead of popping haha, but all g
it doesnt help i havent hit any rolls
keen to see these dice stats
Rolls have been really tough on you
i mean my setup was bad to begin with, but doesnt help if the rolls dont hit either
